sizing_rule.note: Covariance matrix optimization for multi-asset portfolio. Derives optimal position sizes (X values) by solving linear system that minimizes portfolio variance given a target expected return level. Parameters remain silent per author; specific numerical allocation depends on investor-specified return target E and calculated covariance structure.

source_rule_text: Solve a covariance matrix system by selecting a target expected return (E) level, then solve the matrix equations to derive optimal position sizes (X values) for multiple correlated instruments that minimize portfolio variance.
